page: Vultr vcg-l40s-32c-375g-96vram is a Cloud GPU family server configured with dual NVIDIA L40S GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, providing a total of 96 GB of VRAM. The system is powered by an Intel x86_64 processor offering 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs with a single thread per core. This hardware configuration is paired with 375.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 11.72 GB of RAM per core.

Local storage is bundled with the instance, featuring a 2200 GB NVMe SSD to support high-throughput data access. The instance also includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. A key architectural tradeoff is the shared CPU allocation model, which may introduce resource contention compared to dedicated CPU instances, though the substantial memory capacity and dual-GPU setup offset this for accelerator-heavy workloads.

This server is designed for workloads that require significant parallel processing capabilities and large memory footprints. Appropriate use cases include large language model inference, deep learning training, complex data science jobs, and high-performance rendering tasks that leverage the dual NVIDIA L40S accelerators.
description: Vultr vcg-l40s-32c-375g-96vram is a Cloud GPU server designed for accelerator-heavy workloads. It features two NVIDIA L40S GPUs from the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined 96 GB of VRAM. The host system is equipped with an Intel x86_64 processor configured with 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs under a shared allocation model. System memory is provisioned at 375.0 GB, providing 11.72 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance includes a 2200 GB NVMe SSD, ensuring fast data retrieval for large datasets. While the shared CPU allocation presents a potential tradeoff for CPU-bound tasks, the dense memory and dual-GPU configuration make this server highly efficient for GPU-accelerated workloads. It is well-suited for deep learning, large-scale AI inference, and data science pipelines.
og_description: Vultr vcg-l40s-32c-375g-96vram is a Cloud GPU server featuring dual NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 96 GB total VRAM, 32 Intel vCPUs, 375 GB RAM, and a 2200 GB NVMe SSD for intensive parallel computing workloads.

tagline: A dual-GPU accelerator platform featuring ninety-six gigabytes of VRAM, dense system memory, and high-speed local NVMe storage.
